auth.tagline: Character sheet for the world after the end

dashboard.title: Your games
dashboard.noGames: You don't have any games yet.
dashboard.noGamesHint: Create a new game or join via an invite link.

game.noHeroes: No characters yet. Create the first one!
game.inviteHint: Share this link to invite players.
game.regenerateConfirm: The old link will stop working. Continue?
game.deleteConfirm: Delete game "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.
game.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this game.
game.invalidToken: The invite link is invalid or has expired.

settings.deleteHint: Permanently delete this character. This action cannot be undone.

hero.deleteConfirm: Delete character "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
hero.versionCurrentTitle: Sheet version v{{version}} — up to date
hero.versionOutdatedTitle: Sheet version v{{current}} — latest is v{{latest}}
hero.versionOutdated: This sheet (v{{current}}) is outdated — current system version is v{{latest}}. Some fields may be missing.

tooltips.zdrowie: Innate vitality and biological resilience of the organism.
tooltips.kondycja: Limits of physical effort and ability to act under prolonged strain.
tooltips.precyzja: Accuracy, reflex and control over one's own body.
tooltips.tezyzna: Raw, brutal power to affect the environment using one's body.
tooltips.opanowanie: Ability to keep control in situations of fear and chaos.
tooltips.determinacja: Strength of will and willingness to sacrifice for a goal.
tooltips.empatia: Natural ability to understand the emotions and needs of others.
tooltips.ego: Force of personality and ability to impose one's will.
tooltips.rozsadek: Practical knowledge and ability to logically assess situations.
tooltips.percepcja: Ability to observe the world and pick up on environmental details.
tooltips.inteligencja: Ability to understand the world's mechanisms and solve problems.
tooltips.kreatywnosc: Ability to find new solutions in seemingly hopeless situations.

images.title: Gallery
images.deleteConfirm: Delete this image? This cannot be undone.

skillTooltips.wspinaczka: Scaling vertical surfaces, walls, cliffs and other obstacles.
skillTooltips.plywanie: Moving efficiently through water, diving and holding breath.
skillTooltips.parkour: Rapid movement through urban environments using jumps and vaults.
skillTooltips.ukrywanie: Moving and staying hidden without being noticed.
skillTooltips.wyszukiwanie: Finding useful items, supplies and resources in ruins.
skillTooltips.pojazdy: Operating cars, motorcycles, trucks and other vehicles.
skillTooltips.nawigacja: Finding the way using maps, stars or natural landmarks.
skillTooltips.bron_biala: Using bladed and blunt melee weapons in combat.
skillTooltips.bron_palna: Shooting with pistols, rifles and other firearms.
skillTooltips.bron_miotana: Throwing objects — knives, grenades, rocks — accurately.
skillTooltips.strzelectwo: Using bows, crossbows and other ranged muscle-powered weapons.
skillTooltips.taktyka: Planning combat actions, ambushes and tactical operations.
skillTooltips.bron_ciezka: Operating heavy weapons: machine guns, rocket launchers, mounted arms.
skillTooltips.medycyna: Treating wounds, infections, diseases and performing surgery.
skillTooltips.chemia: Creating and understanding chemical compounds, poisons and explosives.
skillTooltips.fizyka: Applying physical principles to solve practical problems.
skillTooltips.biologia: Understanding living organisms, viruses and the mutation process.
skillTooltips.historia: Knowledge of events before and after the Collapse.
skillTooltips.szyfry: Encoding and decoding messages, cracking security systems.
skillTooltips.mechanika: Repairing and constructing mechanical and electronic devices.
skillTooltips.kowalstwo: Working metal — forging tools, blades and armour.
skillTooltips.rusznikarstwo: Repairing, modifying and crafting firearms and ammunition.
skillTooltips.budownictwo: Planning and erecting structures, fortifications and shelters.
skillTooltips.krawiectwo: Sewing, repairing and crafting clothing and protective gear.
skillTooltips.kucharstwo: Preparing food, preserving provisions and detecting poison.
skillTooltips.elektrotechnika: Working with electrical systems, generators and electronics.
skillTooltips.zastraszanie: Using fear, physical presence or threats to influence others.
skillTooltips.przekonywanie: Convincing others through argument, facts and rhetoric.
skillTooltips.manipulacja: Deceiving, gaslighting and subtly controlling other people.
skillTooltips.dowodzenie: Leading groups, maintaining morale and coordinating actions.
skillTooltips.handel: Negotiating prices, bartering goods and detecting counterfeits.
skillTooltips.wyczucie: Reading intentions, detecting lies and judging character.
skillTooltips.zielarstwo: Identifying plants, preparing herbal remedies and poisons.
skillTooltips.tresura: Training animals to follow commands and perform tasks.
skillTooltips.hodowla: Caring for, breeding and managing livestock and animals.
skillTooltips.jezdziectwo: Riding horses and other mounts in various conditions.
skillTooltips.pulapki: Setting, concealing and detecting traps and snares.
skillTooltips.tropienie: Following tracks, reading trail signs and locating prey.
skillTooltips.zwyczaje_ocalałych: Knowledge of customs, codes and social norms among survivor groups.
skillTooltips.rytualy: Performing and understanding mystical Awakened practices.
skillTooltips.deathnet: Interfacing with the zombie hive-mind signal network.
skillTooltips.livecore: Understanding and interacting with the LiveCore life-force technology.
skillTooltips.zombie: Knowledge of zombie behaviour, variants, weaknesses and biology.
skillTooltips.mutacje: Understanding, controlling and developing personal mutations.

chat.gmOnlyHint: Message visible only to the Game Master
